name: bttn
desc: Copy any AI conversation (Claude, ChatGPT, Grok, AI Studio) to clean Markdown with one click.

name: cite
desc: One-click academic citations in APA, MLA, Chicago, BibTeX, and Plain Text from any webpage.

name: md-memo
desc: Save any article or blog post as clean Markdown with YAML frontmatter — ready for Obsidian or Notion.

name: multi-peek
desc: Choose from multiple archiving services (archive.is, Wayback Machine, etc.) to bypass paywalls.

name: peek
desc: Instantly redirect any page to archive.is/latest/ — bypass paywalls and recover deleted content.

name: quote
desc: Select any text on a page and capture it as a Markdown blockquote with full citation — perfect for research notes.

name: reader
desc: Distraction-free reading mode. Strips ads, sidebars, and clutter for a clean, Kindle-like experience.

name: stats
desc: Instant page statistics: word count, reading time, heading structure, link density, and more.

name: toc
desc: Generate a beautiful, standalone Table of Contents page from any long article or documentation.

name: x-memo
desc: Export any X/Twitter thread to clean Markdown with YAML frontmatter — perfect for your second brain.

name: yt-memo
desc: Turn any YouTube video into Markdown with title, chapters, description, and full transcript.

name: dark
desc: Toggle dark mode on any website. Images stay natural. One click on, one click off.

name: links
desc: Extract all external links from any page as a deduplicated Markdown list with YAML frontmatter.

name: reddit-memo
desc: Export any Reddit thread — post body, comments, and nested replies — to clean Markdown with one click.
